document_title: Summary of FinTech Sector Strategy in State of Qatar
objectives: Support diversification and innovation within financial services
Position Qatar as a hub for FinTech and financial innovation
Increase financial inclusion and efficiency in Qatar

strategic_pillars.name: FinTech Foundation and Infrastructure
strategic_pillars.description: Build world-class infrastructure, regulations, and collaboration platforms to support innovation and FinTech development.
focus_areas: Ethical and Green FinTech (ESG, Islamic finance)

strategic_pillars.name: FinTalent and Capability Excellence
strategic_pillars.description: Develop FinTech talent and establish a FinTech Center of Excellence in Qatar.
focus_areas: Entrepreneurial training, incubation, and acceleration programs
Cross-border collaboration and talent visa initiatives

strategic_pillars.name: FinTouch
strategic_pillars.description: Enable FinTech to impact citizens and corporations by improving financial services accessibility and inclusion.
focus_areas: Digital financial services adoption across sectors

strategic_pillars.name: Strategic Positioning and Growth
strategic_pillars.description: Strengthen Qatar’s leadership and competitiveness in FinTech regionally and globally.
focus_areas: FinTech regulatory framework and sandbox expansion
Launch flagship FinTech events and global partnerships

emerging_technology_adoption: More innovations and new financial products

summary: The Qatar Central Bank aims to lead the FinTech transformation in Qatar by fostering a robust, inclusive, and innovation-driven financial ecosystem aligned with QNV 2030.
